prose:
Dipole moment (|μ|): 11.635852 D

Method provenance
Property: electric dipole magnitude.
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding), xtb backend.
Geometry: fixed user-supplied glycine-zwitterion geometry (/Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/electrostatics-validation/glycine-zwitterion/glycine_zwitterion.xyz); no relaxation – single-point electrostatics (GFN2-xTB//input geometry).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: xtb via chemkit (exact command recorded in cli_invocation of the result JSON).
Convergence & warnings: calculation completed without warnings; integrity check passed (partial charges sum consistent with net charge). The live engine output was streamed to the default chemkit log (electrostatics_<timestamp>.out) in the working directory during the run; see that file for SCF cycles and full transcript.

Computed value reported exactly as returned by chemkit; no rounding applied.
